requirement: the format specification is well-structured and readable

findings.observation: Sections introduce concepts before dependent detail: Conformance and Terminology precede Frontmatter Schema, Evaluation Semantics, and Report Semantics.
Annotated YAML skeletons with inline Required/Optional/Recommended comments make field structure scannable in place of dense prose.
The document carries minimal, realistic examples (suggested scale, minimal document) that a reader can copy and adapt; prose is plain.

rationale: Logical ordering, scannable annotated schema blocks, plain prose, and copy-ready examples make the spec navigable and readable. Satisfies the requirement.
